name: dayz-dev
description: Codex packaging of DayZGhost's DayZ development references with verified local Enforce Script APIs.

interface.longDescription: A JustWats-maintained Codex port of DayZGhost's project. Review, explain, and edit DayZ Enforce Script using local source first, without changing upstream authorship.
defaultPrompt: Review this DayZ mod for Enforce Script API mistakes
Find the correct DayZ class or method for this feature
Create a safe DayZ mod pattern for this system
